root.title: DaDiary — Your skin diary · Friendly AI skincare buddy every day
root.description: Personal skin diary + a friendly AI skincare buddy: daily photo check-ins, simple morning & evening routines, and clear personalized tips. Long-term before/after and your skincare shelf — supportive, evidence-friendly, encouraging. Built to scale regions and weather, not locked to one country.

checkIn.title: Skin check-in · DaDiary
checkIn.description: Photos + how your skin feels today — your AI buddy gives kind feedback: what's going well, small next steps, plus sunscreen / barrier reminders.

onboarding.title: Get to know your skin · DaDiary
onboarding.description: Face photos so the AI can suggest your skin type & undertone, then edit & finish — a personalized starter routine.

progress.title: See how your skin changes · DaDiary
progress.description: Your check-in timeline and before/after view — long-term trends, gentle gauges, and weekly nudges.

cabinet.title: Skincare shelf · DaDiary
cabinet.description: Track products you use and safe gaps to fill — syncs with check-ins when the API is ready.

login.title: Sign in · DaDiary
login.description: Sign in to save your check-ins, skin profile, and skincare shelf.

register.title: Sign up · DaDiary
register.description: Create an account — get to know your skin and receive a starter routine from your AI buddy.

coachWelcome.title: Your starter routine · DaDiary
coachWelcome.description: See your personalized morning/evening routine, safety notes, and rate your AI buddy.

routine.title: Morning & evening skincare · DaDiary
routine.description: Build your morning & evening skincare — edit, reorder, tick steps daily, and get AI suggestions based on your skin.

auth.loginSub: Use your email and password to check in and save your skin profile.
auth.registerSub: After sign-up you'll go through getting to know your skin — save your skin type and get a starter routine from your AI buddy.
auth.errorGeneric: Something didn't work. Check your details or that the backend is running.
auth.captchaRequired: Finish the security check below, then try signing up again.
auth.captchaFailed: The security check did not pass — please try again.
auth.captchaUnavailable: We could not verify the security check right now. Try again in a moment.
auth.captchaHint: Quick check to prevent automated sign-ups — usually one tap.
auth.networkError: Network error or could not reach the backend.
auth.finishNetworkError: Couldn't save your onboarding. You'll need to sign in and have the backend running — but you can still use the local UI.
auth.finishNeedAuth: You need to sign in to save this. You can sign in and come back to this step.
auth.finishSuccess: Profile saved & starter routine ready (from your AI buddy).
auth.fieldBodyConcerns: Other body areas to look after (optional)
auth.placeholderBodyConcerns: e.g. back acne, dry hands — separate with commas
auth.fieldCurrentRoutine: How are you currently caring for your skin? (optional)
auth.placeholderCurrentRoutine: e.g. AM: cleanse + moisturizer + sunscreen; PM: cleanse + retinol 2x/week

footer.tagline: Your skin diary · AI buddy · progress & before/after

pwa.title: Install DaDiary on your home screen
pwa.description: Open faster, works offline — like a tiny skincare app of your own.
pwa.updateDialogLabel: A new DaDiary version is available
pwa.updateDescription: DaDiary has been updated. Reload to get the latest version.
pwa.offlineBanner: You're offline — some features may not work.
pwa.offlineNoticeBody: Some features (photo uploads, AI buddy, saving routines) may not work until you're back online.
pwa.offlineCheckInBody: Uploading check-in photos and getting AI feedback need a connection. You can still prepare your entry and submit it later.

hero.slogan: Your skin diary — a friendly AI skincare buddy every day
hero.titleLead: Care for your skin gently every day —
hero.titleGradient: clear before/after, morning & evening routines with a plan.
hero.body: DaDiary is your personal skin diary + a friendly AI skincare buddy: photo check-ins, simple routine notes, and practical personalized tips. Today we tune for common needs in Vietnam (oilier skin, heat & humidity, breakouts, sun-related dark spots) while staying region-agnostic — ready for global expansion, weather hooks, and climate context later.

features.heading: Skin diary + AI buddy — for total beginners and serious skincare lovers alike.
features.sub: Friendly, science-made-simple, encouraging. Routines and check-ins are built to grow weather, region-aware tips, after-sun flows, and more without rewriting core models.

starter.title: Get to know your skin
starter.desc: Skin type, common concerns (oil, acne, spots…), goals, and habits — your buddy meets you at Beginner / Mid / Advanced.

checkIn.title: Daily skin check-in
checkIn.desc: Photos + how your skin feels; warm AI feedback and routine ideas — not a substitute for a dermatologist.

cabinet.title: Skincare shelf
cabinet.desc: Track what you use: avoid duplicate ingredients, remember opened dates, patch tests, and sunscreen.

timeline.title: Progress & before/after
timeline.desc: Photo timeline with consistent angles/lighting — see real long-term change instead of guessing.

howItWorks.heading: Three steps: get to know your skin → check-in & buddy → shelf & how your skin changes.
howItWorks.side: Roadmap: multi-region support and optional weather/context (humidity, UV) later — the data model already reserves climate/location fields.

s1.title: Get to know your skin
s1.desc: Capture skin type and recurring issues so your buddy understands your context (e.g. humid heat, oiliness, post-acne marks) without locking you to one country.

s2.title: Check-in + AI buddy
s2.desc: Daily photo + signals; warm feedback and routine hints tuned to the depth you choose.

s3.title: Skincare shelf + before/after timeline
s3.desc: Organize your shelf, track long-run progress, compare photos fairly. Community is like / not-for-me only — no toxicity.

progressPreview.heading: Browse other check-ins — like / not-for-me only.
progressPreview.sub: Light encouragement and ideas; your personal diary, timeline, and before/after live in your private flow.

cta.heading: Want to start your skin diary today?
cta.body: You don't need a perfect routine on day one — get to know your skin, or jump straight into a check-in. Your buddy scales with you (Beginner → Advanced).

checkIn.pageSub: Add photos (same angle/light when you can) and tell us how your skin feels. DaDiary replies in the mode you pick (Beginner / Mid / Advanced) — supportive and explainable, not a replacement for medical advice.
checkIn.heroStepPhotoDesc: 1–6 photos at the same angle make timelines easy to compare.
checkIn.heroStepCoachDesc: Your buddy reads your tags + photos and suggests tiny tweaks for today.
checkIn.heroStepSafetyDesc: Sunscreen · patch test · red flags → see a clinician.
checkIn.photoHint: 1–6 photos. Same angle and natural light make timelines easier to compare.
checkIn.dropTitle: Drag & drop or tap to choose photos
checkIn.dropHint: PNG · JPG · WebP — up to 6 photos
checkIn.skipModeBanner: Tag + notes only mode — no photos needed. The AI will still respond, but it's a bit less precise without a photo.
checkIn.skipBlocking: You opted out of face photos — switch to tag + notes mode to send quickly, or re-enable photo capture from Settings.
checkIn.skipModeNeedTags: Tag + notes mode: pick at least one feeling tag or jot a few words so your buddy has something to read.
checkIn.blurWorkingHint: Face hidden on screen — original kept for accurate AI analysis.
checkIn.blurMethodHeuristic: We blurred the eye area using a typical face position — retake if your eyes are still visible.
checkIn.blurMethodSkipped: No clear face detected — preview shown without blur.
checkIn.blurFailure: We couldn't blur this image on your device. Try another photo or switch to tag + notes mode.
checkIn.photoTipsTitle: Tips so your timeline stays comparable
checkIn.photoTipLight: Natural window light — avoid direct flash.
checkIn.photoTipAngle: Same angle and distance as yesterday when possible.
checkIn.photoTipClean: Freshly washed skin, no filter or retouching.
checkIn.emptyImageSkipped: Skipped an empty file (0 bytes). Pick a real photo from your library or capture a new one.
checkIn.modeFromOnboarding: Loaded from getting-to-know-your-skin — you can override for today.
checkIn.modeHint: Nothing picked? We default to gentle encouragement + 1–2 concrete tips (Beginner — simple mode).
checkIn.placeholderTitle: e.g. Week 3 BHA, dry season in Hanoi
checkIn.placeholderUserNote: Morning/evening steps, new products, how it feels…
checkIn.placeholderEnv: Weather, AC all day, time outside, sleep…
checkIn.fieldConditions: How your skin feels today (pick any)
checkIn.symptomsHint: Different from “how it feels” — capture sensations or context (e.g. stinging after a new cream).
checkIn.afterSubmit: After you send: photos + notes are saved and your AI buddy responds on this page (may take a few minutes).
checkIn.needImage: Pick at least one skin photo (face or the area you track).
checkIn.success: Check-in sent. Your buddy is reading — a summary will appear when ready.
checkIn.needAuth: You need to sign in to send a check-in (connect auth on the backend for demos).
checkIn.networkError: Could not reach the API (or CORS). Check `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` and the backend — multipart field names are correct.
checkIn.analyzingCoach: Reading your photos and writing a friendly response — this can take a few minutes. Keep the tab open.
checkIn.coachBeforeSubmit: Send to receive: a small praise, today's read, routine tweaks, what to ease off, and safety notes.

coach.title: Today's notes from your buddy
coach.alignment: Your tags vs. soft photo read
coach.processingHint: Usually ready within about a minute. Keep this tab open.
coach.failedUnknown: The reading step didn't work. Try submitting again — if it keeps failing, wait a few minutes.
coach.pollTimeout: Analysis took too long or the server did not respond. Try a new check-in.
coach.rateHint: Your vote helps us improve your buddy.

routineBridge.title: Today's skincare, in one tap
routineBridge.subtitle: Apply the morning/evening ideas above to today's skincare, then tick steps as you do them — without leaving this page.
routineBridge.subtitleNoSuggestion: Today's saved skincare — tick steps as you do them. Tap “Open” to edit.
routineBridge.applyHint: Adds {am} morning · {pm} evening step(s). You can edit anytime.
routineBridge.saveError: Couldn't save your tick. Try again in a moment.
routineBridge.applyError: Couldn't apply. Try again in a moment.
routineBridge.emptyHint: Nothing for today yet. Tap “Apply to today” above, or open the page to start one.

coachWelcome.title: Your starter routine
coachWelcome.subtitle: Morning/evening steps from your getting-to-know-your-skin answers — friendly, doable, not a substitute for a dermatologist.
coachWelcome.empty: No starter data yet. Finish getting-to-know-your-skin while signed in.
coachWelcome.backOnboarding: Back to getting to know your skin
coachWelcome.safety: Safety & when to see a pro
coachWelcome.rateHint: Your vote helps us improve your buddy over time.
coachWelcome.needSignIn: Sign in to see your starter routine from getting-to-know-your-skin.
coachWelcome.errorFetch: Couldn't load your profile. Please try again.
coachWelcome.errorNetwork: Network hiccup — check your connection and retry.

cabinet.title: What you use & what to add next
cabinet.sub: Demo: when the backend ships, DaDiary will sync products from check-ins and your AI buddy — avoid duplicate ingredients, remember sunscreen and patch tests.
cabinet.usingHint: Log your real products — feature in design.
cabinet.wishHint: Try just one new ingredient per month — fewer simultaneous changes so you can read your skin's signals.
cabinet.starterTitle: Starter routine (from getting to know your skin)
demoWishlist: BHA/PHA exfoliant — alternate 2–3 nights a week when skin feels stable
Niacinamide 5% if you struggle with oil / visible pores
Petrolatum lip balm for dry corners and seasons

progress.title: Your skin journey
progress.sub: Compare before–after, track trends by week and month. Consistent check-ins are what make the timeline truly useful.

summary.headlineUp: Overall score is up {pct} vs last month — keep going!
summary.headlineDown: Overall score is slightly down {pct} — let's ease back into a gentler rhythm.
summary.headlineFlat: Overall score is steady — consistency adds up.
summary.noComparisonYet: Not enough data yet — keep checking in.

beforeAfter.title: Before · After
beforeAfter.hint: Comparing the oldest and newest photo in the selected window. Same lighting and angle make the comparison more honest.

entry.failed: Couldn't read the entry — try checking in again.

empty.title: No check-ins in this range yet
empty.body: Start with one photo today and a few feeling tags — after 3–5 days you'll see a real timeline and before–after view.

errors.needAuth: Please sign in to view your progress.
errors.networkError: Network hiccup — give it another try in a moment.

onboarding.title: Starter routine
onboarding.intro: Take a few face photos so the AI can read signals — you can always edit before saving. No comparison, no pressure.

photos.title: Face photos for the AI
photos.hint: 2–3 photos: natural light, no makeup, front + slight side angle if you can.
photos.tipLight: Stand near a window; avoid harsh flash.
photos.tipAngle: One straight-on portrait + one ¾ profile.
photos.analyzeFail: Reading didn't work. Retry or check backend & OpenAI.
photos.skipBody: You're in face-free mode — onboarding still completes, the AI will rely on your skin feelings & habits. You can re-enable photo capture any time in Settings → Privacy.
photos.skipSwitchBack: I changed my mind — re-enable photos

aiReview.title: AI suggestions for you
aiReview.subtitle: Hints from photos — not a medical diagnosis.

barrierValues.possibly_compromised: May feel stressed — go gentle and soothe

onboarding.summaryFoot: Daily photos + skin notes make the timeline and your buddy sharper. We won't promise “perfect skin” overnight — just clear progress when you stay consistent.
onboarding.skillHint: Adjusts how detailed wording is in your diary and buddy notes.

steps.typeTitle: Skin type that fits best right now

goal.unsure: Not sure yet — coach me gradually

beginner.title: Beginner (simple mode)
beginner.desc: For total beginners — only the basic steps, plain words, slower pace.

intermediate.title: Mid mode
intermediate.desc: Introduces ingredients & step order; balanced, safety-first tips.

advanced.title: Advanced mode
advanced.desc: Goes deeper on ingredients, product combinations, patch testing.

packLines.skillBeginner0: Safe base: gentle cleanser + moisturizer + sunscreen in the morning (even at home near windows).
packLines.skillBeginner1: Try at most one new ingredient per week — and patch test on a small area first.
packLines.skillIntermediate0: Alternate ingredients (e.g. BHA/PHA at night) — always pair with hydration + soothing when skin feels tight.
packLines.skillIntermediate1: Log routines for 5–7 days to spot patterns; don't change too many products at once.
packLines.skillAdvanced0: Layer with intent; track pH and order for acids/retinol.
packLines.skillAdvanced1: Compare photos with the same lighting/angle before calling something “progress.”
packLines.budgetEntry: Prioritize solid drugstore formulas: pH ~5–6 cleanser, ceramide moisturizer, durable sunscreen over pricey serums.
packLines.budgetMid: Invest in one targeted serum + one calming moisturizer; keep the rest minimal.
packLines.budgetFlexible: You can shift budget toward treatments / quality sunscreen + a lean toolkit.

onboarding.goalCoachLine: Focus: {goal} — your buddy explains “why” before “what to buy.”
onboarding.contextCoachLine: Context: {contexts} — tips will mention sunscreen / cleansing / recovery for your lifestyle.

routine.pageSub: Build a rhythm that fits your skin, tick steps as you do them, or let AI draft one for you in seconds.
routine.carriedBadge: Carried over from your last entry — save to apply for today
routine.aiSuggestedBadge: AI suggested — edit if needed then tap Save
routine.modeHint: Beginner: simple 3-step routine. Mid/Advanced: fuller, profile-aware.
routine.modeBeginnerHint: Simple mode is on — just step titles and a tick to mark done. The rest is hidden so it stays calm.
routine.emptyHeroBody: Quickest start: let DaDiary draft a morning/evening rhythm from your skin profile. Preview, tweak, then save — you stay in control.
routine.emptyHeroCta: Let AI draft one for me
routine.notesPlaceholder: How skin feels today, products you're trialing…
routine.saveError: Could not save. Try again in a moment.
routine.emptyBody: Add a few morning or evening steps, or tap “Suggest with AI” to start from a draft built around your skin profile.
routine.aiSuggestBody: DaDiary reads your skin profile + most recent check-in and drafts a morning/evening rhythm. Preview, edit, then save — nothing is overwritten without you.
routine.aiSuggestError: Couldn't reach AI. Try again or check your connection.
routine.aiFocusPlaceholder: e.g. skin feels tight, prefer a gentle routine
routine.aiPreviewHint: Edit in the form above before saving — you're always the one in control.
routine.historyHint: Track how complete each day was — consistency matters more than perfection.
routine.historyEmpty: Save a few days to see your streak appear here.
routine.unsavedHint: You have unsaved changes — tap Save to apply for today.
routine.cleanHint: All changes saved. Tick each step as you finish it.
routine.validateNoSteps: Add at least 1 step (morning or evening) before saving.
routine.validateNoTitle: Some steps are empty — fill in a title or remove them to save.
routine.validateSpfMissing: Gentle nudge: morning skincare should include sunscreen for long-term safety.

checkInContext.title: From your latest check-in
checkInContext.subtitle: Skincare suggestions are tuned to today's skin signals.
checkInContext.emptyHint: Add a quick photo + a few skin tags so the suggestions match how your skin actually feels today.
checkInContext.errorHint: Your routine suggestions may be less accurate until this loads.

privacy.dialogTitle: Before you take a photo — a few promises
privacy.dialogIntro: We want you to feel comfortable and know exactly what happens to your photos.
privacy.dialogBullet1: We only use photos to analyze your skin.
privacy.dialogBullet2: Photos are sent securely for AI skin analysis.
privacy.dialogBullet3: Photos are stored on our servers for analysis — you can delete everything in Settings.
privacy.dialogBullet4: You can wipe all your data any time from Settings.
privacy.dialogDecline: I'd rather not photograph my face

captureCard.title: Take or choose a photo
captureCard.subtitle: Photos are uploaded for AI skin analysis — review them before submitting.
captureCard.blurringHint: Face hidden on your device — the original is kept for analysis.
captureCard.blurredHint: The eye area is hidden on screen. The original is sent to the server so the AI can analyze your skin accurately.
captureCard.blurMethodHeuristic: We blurred the eye area using a typical face position — retake if your eyes are still visible.
captureCard.blurMethodSkipped: No clear face detected — preview shown without blur.
captureCard.blurError: We couldn't blur this image on your device. Try another photo or switch to tag + notes mode.
captureCard.skipCta: I'd rather not photograph my face
captureCard.skipHint: DaDiary still works with just tags + notes — the AI will be a bit less precise.

privacy.settingsSub: You decide what DaDiary knows about your skin. The four promises below apply to both Onboarding and the daily check-in.
privacy.modeStatusFresh: You haven't read the privacy notice yet — it'll appear before your next photo.
privacy.deleteRowSub: Remove uploaded photos, check-in history, skin profile and saved routines. This can't be undone.
privacy.deleteConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to wipe everything?
privacy.deleteConfirmBody: We'll remove your check-ins, photos, profile and saved routines for this account. Your account stays, but you'd start fresh.
privacy.deleteSuccess: All your skin data on this device is gone.
privacy.deleteUnsupported: Local data wiped. Server-side deletion will be available soon — contact support if you need it sooner.
privacy.deleteAuth: You need to sign in to delete data on the server.
privacy.deleteNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Local data is wiped — try again to also clear it server-side.

feedback.rateTitle: Did this feel right for you?
feedback.rateHint: One tap — your vote helps us tailor your buddy over time.
feedback.rateHintAfterVote: Thanks — add a quick reason if you'd like, so your buddy learns faster.
feedback.helpfulAria: Mark this AI suggestion as helpful
feedback.notHelpfulAria: Mark this AI suggestion as not helpful
feedback.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. tone felt clinical, or BHA too strong for sensitive skin…
feedback.reasonThanks: Got it — your buddy will adjust over time.
feedback.error: Couldn't send feedback. Try again in a moment.
